source_catalog.source_title: Majirel Color Chart 2025 (printed document code: LPSEPMAJ03 • 09/25)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: 2-page spread chart for the improved Majirel formula: full shade grid with US dual coding, Cool Cover shade list, dual coding system legend, color wheel/law of color, boosters, mixing guidelines (1:1.5, 1 tube + 3 oz. Majicrème Developer, 12.5/20/30-vol), 35-minute development time, levels of lift (20-vol up to 2, 30-vol up to 3), grey coverage rules (under/over 50% white; Cool Cover by level), Carmilane/Rubilane/DM5 warning, application and rinsing guidelines.
notes: Primary/current source for Majirel line-level technical rules (improved formula, larger 2 oz. tube).
Verified %PDF-1.7 header; parsed with pypdf (2 pages).

source_catalog.source_title: Majirel Color Chart (printed document code: P2634200 • 07/23)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: 9-page brochure covering Majirel, Majirel Cool Inforced, Majirel Cool Cover, Majirouge and Majirel High-Lift: shade grids, Carmilane/Lumax/Rubilane/DM5 shade lists, mix shades (.10/.70/.20/.40/.60, 901S, 900S), Majirel Clear uses, dual coding legend, formulation guidelines (1:1.5 ratio = 1.7 oz. tube + 2.6 oz. Majicrème Developer; High-Lift 1:2 and 50 minutes; 35-minute development; 20/30-vol lift, High-Lift 30/40-vol), grey coverage and blending rules (incl. 6.03/7.03/8.03 complete coverage without mixing), Majicrème developer strengths with percentages incl. 40-vol max, allergy warning, Ionène G + Incell technology, Metal Detox application/rinsing.
notes: Older revision used as a supplement; only source printing developer percentages (12.5-vol 3.75%, 20-vol 6%, 30-vol 9%, 40-vol 12% maximum) and High-Lift / Cool Inforced / Majirouge rules.
Ounce quantities for the 1:1.5 ratio differ from the 2025 chart due to the tube size change; both versions recorded in the technical records.
Verified %PDF-1.7 header; parsed with pypdf (9 pages).

source_catalog.source_title: Dia Light Color Chart 2025 (printed document code: LPJUNDL01; no MM/YY revision date printed)
source_catalog.coverage_summary: 5-page chart for Dia Light acidic gel-crème demi: 'Zero ammonia. Zero lift. Ultra conditioning.' positioning, science panel (acid pH, no lift, cationic polymers), full shade grid with US dual codes and shade names, 2 new coral shades (10.24/10VC, 8.24/8VC), preparation (1:1.5 ratio, 1 tube 1.7 oz. + 2.6 oz. Diactivateur, 6-vol 1.8% or 9-vol 2.7%), flexible processing time 2-20 minutes, Liquifier instructions and dosing, DM5/Rubilane warning, dual coding legend, Metal Detox application and rinsing.
notes: Sole source needed for Dia Light line-level technical rules; chart prints no grey-coverage instructions (recorded as a data gap).
Verified %PDF-1.7 header; parsed with pypdf (5 pages).

missing_source_targets: Official Majirel product page (https://us.lorealprofessionnel.com/all-products/hair-color/majirel-permanent-creme-color) and the shade-charts hub were listed as optional fallbacks but were not fetched: the three official PDFs contained all required line-level technical content.
No official US technical guide for Dia Light grey blending/coverage was located within scope; the Dia Light 2025 chart prints no grey coverage rules.
issue_log: All three PDFs downloaded 2026-06 via curl, %PDF header verified, parsed with python3 + pypdf; all values recorded verbatim from extracted text.
Dia Light chart prints only the document code LPJUNDL01 without a MM/YY revision date, so publication_or_revision_date is null for that source (the URL/filename labels it 2025).
Majirel charts conflict on ounce quantities for the 1:1.5 ratio (2025: 1 tube + 3 oz.; 2023: 1.7 oz. tube + 2.6 oz.) due to the 2025 tube-size change; both recorded, 2025 chart treated as current.
